findings.location: s2 — 携帯電話番号レコード / 携帯電話番号(加入)
findings.description: Source description for 携帯電話番号(加入) includes ":必須" as part of the base format constraint ("半角数字:4桁以下:必須"), distinguishing it from 携帯電話番号(市内) which has no such base qualifier ("半角数字:4桁以下" only). The knowledge file renders both fields with the same description "半角数字:4桁以下 / ※...", dropping the ":必須" from 加入 and making the two fields appear identical in requirement level.
findings.source_evidence: 携帯電話番号(市内): '半角数字:4桁以下' (no :必須); 携帯電話番号(加入): '半角数字:4桁以下:必須' (has :必須)
